description: Ground truth labels for seven-segment display OCR test images

images.notes: Propane/fuel tank display labeled 'CAPACITY REMAINING', value in gallons
12-digit calculator display showing sequential digits 1–9 then 0, 1, 2
RSA SecurID hardware token; display renders as two groups '156 311' but value is the 6-digit OTP
Gas pump total display: $86.47 (price, top row), 14.659 gallons (bottom row)
Shell gas pump 'This Sale' display: $29.29 (price, top row), 13.318 gallons (bottom row)

ATYPICAL colon: round top dot + an alarm-bell ICON as the lower 'dot' (not a standard colon). Retained as an out-of-distribution stress case; the standard-colon test is Digital-clock-radio-basic_hf.jpg.

Standard red-LED clock radio, 12:17 PM, clean two-dot colon. Source: Wikimedia Commons (Digital-clock-radio-basic_hf.jpg). Baseline reads the colon correctly but prepends '-' from the AUTO. indicator LED (-> '-12:17'); the digits-only crop reads '12:17' perfectly, confirming large standard colons already work.
